title: rubus perrieri
intro: Rubus perrieri, also known as Perrier's raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to Madagascar. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Rubus perrieri include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Rubus perrieri can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
